case_title: DUERING, DEBRA vs. CELESTE, RIZAL et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUERING, DEBRA AS TO DEFENDANT CELESTE, RIZAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUERING, DEBRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CELESTE, RIZAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 68 6TH ST #15, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.[CCP 415.46]
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CELESTE, RIZAL

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CELESTE, RIZAL
